archetype: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) customized for Heritage Tourism

typography.instructions: Never use Inter. Use Cormorant Garamond for all headings. The typographic mood is editorial, high-end, and heritage-focused. Use tight tracking for headings and loose tracking for uppercase overlines.

colors.instructions: The palette reflects earthy and authentic tones: terracotta, indigo, sandstone/temple-cream, and jade. Use text_primary for headings and text_secondary for body. Use primary color exclusively for CTAs and highlights. The base background should be #F5F2EB to evoke a warm, physical feel.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Editorial Narrative, Cinematic Flow
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use large paddings like py-24, py-32 for sections to give content breathing room. Containers should have ample inner padding.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' for the Destinations Gallery and Tour Packages. Avoid symmetrical 3-column rows everywhere; mix col-spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4) to create tension.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Favor left-aligned text for paragraphs and lists. Overlap images with text blocks to mimic print magazine layouts.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Use subtle 1px borders (border-border) for cards, with no shadows or very diffuse, warm shadows.
layout_and_spacing.admin_layout: Control Room Grid (Mode B) for the admin dashboard. Keep it dense, functional, but matching the color palette (e.g., #FAFAF7 surface on #F5F2EB background).

marketing.approach: Custom HTML/Tailwind for layouts. No Shadcn structural elements for marketing sections to maintain the unique editorial feel.
marketing.hero: Full-height or 80vh cinematic hero. If text overlays an image, use a subtle gradient mask (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) rather than a flat overlay. Must evoke slow-pacing emotion.
marketing.nav: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F2EB]/80) and a subtle bottom border. Include brand logo, nav links, and a primary CTA.
marketing.dividers: Incorporate subtle Pattachitra-inspired SVG motifs or simple elegant lines between major sections.
marketing.testimonials: Editorial quote blocks. Large serif quotes with small uppercase attribution.
marketing.forms: Inquiry form should use customized Shadcn components (Input, Textarea, Select), blending seamlessly into the #F5F2EB background with earthy border colors.

admin.approach: Use customized Shadcn UI components. Keep surfaces flat or with max 8px border-radius.
admin.sidebar: Dark indigo (#1A2A44) sidebar with white/cream text for contrast.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons should lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow should become deeper. Images in gallery should scale up subtly (scale-105) on hover within an overflow-hidden container.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use slow, ease-out transitions (duration-500 or duration-700) to reinforce the slow, high-end travel vibe.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Staggered fade-up entrances for text and images as they enter the viewport.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use text shadows if necessary.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="inquiry-submit-button"`, `data-testid="package-card"`).

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY these specific images. Do not use generic placeholders. Match images to their described sections.

hero.description: Ancient carvings on the historic Konark Sun Temple. Perfect for hero section to establish deep heritage.

packages.title: Golden Triangle
packages.description: Intricate stone wheel sculpture at Konark.

packages.title: Chilika Lake
packages.description: People riding a blue boat on Chilika Lake.

packages.title: Tribal Circuit
packages.description: An old woman with a drum in her hand, showcasing tribal culture.

gallery.description: Colorful traditional silk fabrics showcasing local craftsmanship.

about.description: Portrait of an Odissi dancer. Adds a human, authentic touch to the company story.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for standard icons. Keep icon sizes consistent. For dividers, use custom inline SVGs inspired by Pattachitra art or simple elegant lines.
